headline: Seagate Debt Redemption Reshapes Balance Sheet And Investor Risk Picture
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) has redeemed all of its 3.50% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2028. The move removes approximately US$150.7 million of debt from the balance sheet. The redemption is intended to reduce leverage and increase financial flexibility for the company. Seagate, a major supplier of data storage solutions, is closely tied to trends in cloud infrastructure and high-capacity drives used in AI and data center workloads. With AI-related data creation and storage...
